texts.label: text
texts.text: Figure 3. Composite figure summarizing structure, curve, and failure snapshots.

texts.label: text
texts.text: Panel a plots the stress-strain response, panel b shows the deformed specimen, and panel c highlights the fracture path.

texts.label: text
texts.text: Figure 4. Microstructure image of the fractured surface after compression.

texts.label: text
texts.text: The SEM image reveals pore collapse and ligament tearing across the microstructure.

pictures.description: Panel a, b, and c are a composite figure with curves, snapshots, and fracture path annotations.
SEM microstructure image of the fractured surface after compression.
